summary:
This workflow automatically keeps a set of document summaries up to date whenever changes are pushed to the main branch.

What it does:
- Watches for new code or content pushed to `main`.
- Ignores changes that only affect the generated DiffDoc files themselves, so it does not keep re-triggering on its own output.
- Runs on a GitHub-hosted Linux machine.
- Uses either local AI settings or cloud AI settings, depending on what is configured.
- Checks out the full repository history so it can compare changes properly.
- Installs the project’s dependencies and builds the DiffDoc tool.
- Runs DiffDoc in “delta” mode to update summary files and the manifest, including a snapshot of the code.
- If those generated files changed, it automatically commits them back to the repository.

Business behavior:
- Keeps documentation-like summaries synchronized with the latest code changes.
- Reduces manual work for the team by generating and saving updates automatically.
- Ensures the repository always has current summary artifacts after changes land on main.

User impact:
- Developers do not need to remember to update these summaries by hand.
- Reviewers and other stakeholders get more current supporting documentation.
- The main branch stays self-updating with the latest generated summaries.

Rules and controls:
- Only runs on pushes to `main`.
- Does not react to changes in the generated DiffDoc output files, preventing loops.
- Only one run is allowed at a time for this workflow on `main`.
- It can write back to the repository, but only the generated DiffDoc files.
- If nothing changed in the generated output, it does nothing and exits cleanly.

Data movement:
- Reads the full repository contents.
- Produces or updates files under `.diffdoc/`, especially:
  - `.diffdoc/manifest.json`
  - `.diffdoc/summaries/**`
- Commits those generated files back into the same repository.

Visible outcome:
- After a push to `main`, the repository may receive an automatic commit titled:
  - `Update DiffDoc summaries`
- If there were no meaningful summary changes, no commit is made.
raw_code_snapshot:
name: DiffDoc Summaries

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
    paths-ignore:
      - ".diffdoc/manifest.json"
      - ".diffdoc/summaries/**"
      - ".diffdoc/vectra/**"

permissions:
  contents: write

concurrency:
  group: diffdoc-summarize-main
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  summarize:
    name: Update DiffDoc manifest
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    env:
      AI_PROVIDER: ${{ vars.AI_PROVIDER || secrets.AI_PROVIDER || 'local' }}
      DIFFDOC_BASE_DIR: ${{ vars.DIFFDOC_BASE_DIR || secrets.DIFFDOC_BASE_DIR || './.diffdoc' }}
      LOCAL_LLM_ENDPOINT: ${{ vars.LOCAL_LLM_ENDPOINT || secrets.LOCAL_LLM_ENDPOINT }}
      LOCAL_CHAT_MODEL: ${{ vars.LOCAL_CHAT_MODEL || secrets.LOCAL_CHAT_MODEL }}
      LOCAL_EMBED_ENDPOINT: ${{ vars.LOCAL_EMBED_ENDPOINT || secrets.LOCAL_EMBED_ENDPOINT }}
      LOCAL_EMBED_MODEL: ${{ vars.LOCAL_EMBED_MODEL || secrets.LOCAL_EMBED_MODEL }}
      CLOUD_LLM_ENDPOINT: ${{ vars.CLOUD_LLM_ENDPOINT || secrets.CLOUD_LLM_ENDPOINT || 'https://api.openai.com/v1' }}
      CLOUD_CHAT_MODEL: ${{ vars.CLOUD_CHAT_MODEL || secrets.CLOUD_CHAT_MODEL || 'gpt-4o-mini' }}
      CLOUD_EMBED_MODEL: ${{ vars.CLOUD_EMBED_MODEL || secrets.CLOUD_EMBED_MODEL || 'text-embedding-3-small' }}
      OPENAI_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.OPENAI_API_KEY }}

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 22
          cache: npm

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build DiffDoc
        run: npm run build

      - name: Update summary manifest
        run: node dist/index.js summarize --path . --mode delta --include-code-snapshot

      - name: Commit manifest changes
        run: |
          if [ -z "$(git status --porcelain -- .diffdoc/manifest.json .diffdoc/summaries)" ]; then
            echo "No DiffDoc artifact changes to commit."
            exit 0
          fi

          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add .diffdoc/manifest.json .diffdoc/summaries
          git commit -m "Update DiffDoc summaries"
          git push
